evals.prompt: Draw a flowchart of a user login flow
evals.input: User login: start → enter credentials → validate → success or retry
evals.expected: Valid .mmd file created with flowchart syntax, rendered to .png without errors, shows Start, Enter Credentials, Validate, Success, Retry nodes

evals.prompt: Create a sequence diagram for an API request
evals.input: Client calls API, API calls DB, DB returns data, API responds to client
evals.expected: sequenceDiagram .mmd rendered to .png with 4 actors: Client, API, DB — arrows showing request/response flow

evals.input: Animal base class, Dog and Cat subclasses, each with name and sound methods
evals.expected: classDiagram .mmd rendered showing Animal<|--Dog and Animal<|--Cat inheritance, with name and sound() in each class
